title: Transposable element pangenome
author: Cristian Groza
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A genome graph and associated GCSA index describing the transposable element pangenome derived from reference annotations and non-reference insertions from the HG00733 and HG002 genomes.
steps_raw: A genome graph and associated GCSA index describing the transposable element pangenome derived from reference annotations and non-reference insertions from the HG00733 and HG002 genomes.
